reason: Codex runtime ran and applied substantive review-and-fix edits to all three files this run (verified by me: removed posterior/hindsight leaks, fixed degree d->d-tilde in the symmetric-normalization weight, tightened pos_weight/SigmaA wording, confirmed KL and reconstruction-loss constants against canonical TF/PyG code), but no single pass cleanly completed with a captured, fully re-verified final changelog within the turn (the first pass parent was killed by a wait-loop SIGTERM before emitting its changelog; a clean re-run was still in its verification phase at turn end). Deliverables independently re-derived and verified correct by me; gate left re-runnable.
